title: Count Upper
description:
Given a string s, count the number of uppercase vowels in even indices.
    
    For example:
    count_upper('aBCdEf') returns 1
    count_upper('abcdefg') returns 0
    count_upper('dBBE') returns 0

source.paper: Chen, M., Tworek, J., Jun, H., Yuan, Q., Pinto, H.P.O., Kaplan, J., Edwards, H., Burda, Y., Joseph, N., Brockman, G., et al. (2021). Evaluating Large Language Models Trained on Code. arXiv:2107.03374

reference_solution:
def count_upper(s):
    """
    Given a string s, count the number of uppercase vowels in even indices.
    
    For example:
    count_upper('aBCdEf') returns 1
    count_upper('abcdefg') returns 0
    count_upper('dBBE') returns 0
    """
    count = 0
    for i in range(0,len(s),2):
        if s[i] in "AEIOU":
            count += 1
    return count
